replies.msg:
各位excel高手巴打絲打，如果我有1個sheet, 有全部data, 想分成第二個要有A data, 第3個要有B data, 第4個要有C data, 如唔用vba, 有無formula我將全部data果張sheet既data分番去應有既sheet? 如一定要用vba, 有無program 可參考？ 謝謝

全部data example

Date. Amount. Type
1/1/2019 20 A
3/1/2019. 10. A
5/1/2019. 16. C
5/1/2019. 7. B
6/1/2019. 2. A

咁我想A data 果個 sheet show

1/1/2019 20. A
3/1/2019. 10. A
6/1/2019. 2. A

或者有無hints我應該用咩去做呢個功用，thx!

replies.msg:
Option Explicit

Sub splitData()

Dim ws As Worksheet
Dim dict As Object
Dim lr As Long
Dim i As Long
Dim key As Variant
Dim newWs As Worksheet

Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("Sheet1")
Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row #this is not the best way to search for last row, I use it here for simplicity

For i = 2 To lr

If Not dict.Exists(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value2) Then

dict.Add ws.Cells(i, 3).Value2, vbNullString

End If

Next i

For Each key In dict.Keys

Set newWs = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Count))
ws.Cells(1, 1).AutoFilter Field:=3, Criteria1:=key
ws.AutoFilter.Range.SpecialCells(xlCellTypeVisible).Copy Destination:=newWs.Cells(1, 1)

Next key

ws.ShowAllData

End Sub

replies.msg:
try this
Option Explicit

Sub test()

Dim ws As Worksheet
Dim dict As Object
Dim lr As Long
Dim i As Long
Dim typeIndex As Long
Dim key As Variant
Dim newWs As Worksheet

On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("Sheet1")
Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

typeIndex = getIndex(ws, "Type")

lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row

For i = 2 To lr

    If Not dict.Exists(ws.Cells(i, typeIndex).Value2) Then
    
        dict.Add ws.Cells(i, typeIndex).Value2, vbNullString
    
    End If

Next i

For Each key In dict.Keys

    Set newWs = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Count))
    newWs.Name = key
    ws.Cells(1, 1).AutoFilter Field:=typeIndex, Criteria1:=key
    ws.AutoFilter.Range.SpecialCells(xlCellTypeVisible).Copy Destination:=newWs.Cells(1, 1)

Next key

ws.ShowAllData

Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
 
    MsgBox Err.Number & " - " & Err.Description

End Sub

Function getIndex(ByVal ws As Worksheet, ByVal colName As String, Optional ByVal headerRow As Long = 1) As Long

Dim lc As Long
Dim arr As Variant
Dim i As Long

lc = ws.Cells(headerRow, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column

arr = ws.Range(ws.Cells(headerRow, 1), ws.Cells(headerRow, lc))

For i = LBound(arr, 2) To UBound(arr, 2)

    If arr(1, i) = colName Then
        getIndex = i
        Exit For
    End If

Next i

If getIndex = 0 Then
    Err.Raise vbObjectError + 666, "splitData", "column name '" & colName & "' not found" & vbCrLf & _
                                                    "Macro stopped"
End If

End Function

Option Explicit

Sub test()

Dim lr As Long

Dim key As Variant
Dim newWs As Worksheet

lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row

For i = 2 To lr

    If Not dict.Exists(ws.Cells(i, typeIndex).Value2) Then
    
        dict.Add ws.Cells(i, typeIndex).Value2, vbNullString
    
    End If

Next i

For Each key In dict.Keys

    Set newWs = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Count))
    newWs.Name = key
    ws.Cells(1, 1).AutoFilter Field:=typeIndex, Criteria1:=key
    ws.AutoFilter.Range.SpecialCells(xlCellTypeVisible).Copy Destination:=newWs.Cells(1, 1)

Next key

ws.ShowAllData

Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
 
    MsgBox Err.Number & " - " & Err.Description

End Sub

Function getIndex(ByVal ws As Worksheet, ByVal colName As String, Optional ByVal headerRow As Long = 1) As Long

Dim arr As Variant
Dim i As Long

lc = ws.Cells(headerRow, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column

arr = ws.Range(ws.Cells(headerRow, 1), ws.Cells(headerRow, lc))

For i = LBound(arr, 2) To UBound(arr, 2)

    If arr(1, i) = colName Then
        getIndex = i
        Exit For
    End If

Next i

If getIndex = 0 Then
    Err.Raise vbObjectError + 666, "splitData", "column name '" & colName & "' not found" & vbCrLf & _
                                                    "Macro stopped"
End If

End Function

replies.msg:
唔使Ado,簡簡單單幾句搞掟
Sub test()

Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
Set dat = [A1].CurrentRegion
Set tpy = ActiveSheet.UsedRange.Find("Type")

For Each r In dat.Rows
Set Tpye = Cells(r.Row, tpy.Column)
If Tpye = "A" Or Tpye = "Type" Then d(r) = ""
Next

[H1].Resize(d.Count, dat.Columns.Count).Select
[H1].Resize(d.Count, dat.Columns.Count) = Application.Transpose(Application.Transpose(d.keys))

End Sub

[H1].Resize(d.Count, dat.Columns.Count).Select
->
[H1].CurrentRegion.Clear

Sub test()

Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
Set dat = [A1].CurrentRegion
Set tpy = ActiveSheet.UsedRange.Find("Type")

For Each r In dat.Rows
Set Tpye = Cells(r.Row, tpy.Column)
If Tpye = "A" Or Tpye = "Type" Then d(r) = ""
Next

[H1].Resize(d.Count, dat.Columns.Count).clear
[H1].Resize(d.Count, dat.Columns.Count) = Application.Transpose(Application.Transpose(d.keys))

End Sub

Sub test()

Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
Set dat = [A1].CurrentRegion
Set tpy = ActiveSheet.UsedRange.Find("Type")

For Each r In dat.Rows
Set Tpye = Cells(r.Row, tpy.Column)
If Tpye = [H1] Or Tpye = "Type" Then d(r) = ""
Next

Sheets(2).Cells.Clear
Sheets(2).[A1].Resize(d.Count, dat.Columns.Count) = Application.Transpose(Application.Transpose(d.keys))

End Sub

try this
Option Explicit

Sub test()

Dim ws As Worksheet
Dim dict As Object
Dim lr As Long
Dim i As Long
Dim typeIndex As Long
Dim key As Variant
Dim newWs As Worksheet

On Error GoTo ErrorHandler

Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("Sheet1")
Set dict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")

typeIndex = getIndex(ws, "Type")

lr = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row

For i = 2 To lr

    If Not dict.Exists(ws.Cells(i, typeIndex).Value2) Then
    
        dict.Add ws.Cells(i, typeIndex).Value2, vbNullString
    
    End If

Next i

For Each key In dict.Keys

    Set newWs = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(After:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Count))
    newWs.Name = key
    ws.Cells(1, 1).AutoFilter Field:=typeIndex, Criteria1:=key
    ws.AutoFilter.Range.SpecialCells(xlCellTypeVisible).Copy Destination:=newWs.Cells(1, 1)

Next key

ws.ShowAllData

Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
 
    MsgBox Err.Number & " - " & Err.Description

End Sub

Function getIndex(ByVal ws As Worksheet, ByVal colName As String, Optional ByVal headerRow As Long = 1) As Long

Dim lc As Long
Dim arr As Variant
Dim i As Long

lc = ws.Cells(headerRow, ws.Columns.Count).End(xlToLeft).Column

arr = ws.Range(ws.Cells(headerRow, 1), ws.Cells(headerRow, lc))

For i = LBound(arr, 2) To UBound(arr, 2)

    If arr(1, i) = colName Then
        getIndex = i
        Exit For
    End If

Next i

If getIndex = 0 Then
    Err.Raise vbObjectError + 666, "splitData", "column name '" & colName & "' not found" & vbCrLf & _
                                                    "Macro stopped"
End If

End Function

quote.msg:
Sub test()

Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
Set dat = [A1].CurrentRegion
Set tpy = ActiveSheet.UsedRange.Find("Type")

For Each r In dat.Rows
Set Tpye = Cells(r.Row, tpy.Column)
If Tpye = [H1] Or Tpye = "Type" Then d(r) = ""
Next

Sheets(2).Cells.Clear
Sheets(2).[A1].Resize(d.Count, dat.Columns.Count) = Application.Transpose(Application.Transpose(d.keys))

End Sub
